bheng.notes: Root is a long portfolio page with overflow:hidden on body. fixOverflow unlocks full-page capture. Nav links live under /admin/* after login.

claude.notes: Login via standard email/password form. Nav: Overview, Sessions, Prompts, Agents, Rules, Global, Brain, Skills, Commands, Hooks.

diagrams.notes: Has login form. Nav not yet mapped — needs investigation after login.

stickies.notes: Uses Supabase auth (magic link / OAuth) — auto-login not possible. Screenshots public pages only.

mindmaps.notes: Has login form at root. Nav not yet mapped — needs investigation after login.

3pi.notes: Slow pages — wait fully before screenshots. pageWait gives each nav page time to finish rendering.

3pi-poc.notes: No nav detected on public pages. May need login or different nav selector.

tools.notes: 34 nav links. Some pages (memory, name score, network, notes, parse hue, pdfs, prompts) time out — they may be heavy or broken.

drop-web.notes: Next.js app — needs extra wait for hydration before screenshots and nav crawl.

drop.notes: Electron app on port 4111 — often not running. Skip if unreachable.

drop-menu.notes: Electron menubar app — no HTTP server, skip screenshots.

recap.notes: Process-based app (watch.sh), no localUrl — excluded from screenshots.
